name: Website Drop
description: Audit a local web app, choose the simplest host, and get it to a live URL fast. Use when Codex needs to prep a site for deploy, confirm the build path, and ship it with minimal hosting overhead.
short_description: Audit a web app, pick a host, and ship it live fast.
audience: Builders who need a local web project checked before deployment
Teams choosing between Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare, or existing config
Maintainers who want one repeatable build and handoff path
detail_lines: Detects the app type, install command, build command, output directory, and existing deploy config before recommending a host.
Optimizes for the smallest deploy path that fits the project instead of adding multi-host clutter.
Calls out environment-variable and account handoff requirements explicitly, without storing tokens or adding hidden network behavior.
